steps.title: Define contextual analysis
steps.content: An audience unfamiliar with contextual analysis needs a direct explanation of the concept, not only an example, a contrast with pattern analysis, or a discussion of a different approach.

steps.title: Choose the definition
steps.content: Choice A explains pattern analysis. Choice B gives an example involving Les Demoiselles d’Avignon without defining the approach. Choice D contrasts pattern analysis with contextual analysis but does not explain contextual analysis itself. The remaining choice defines it as considering historical and cultural contexts. The answer is C.
